Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets break down the process step by step 1 The patient begins with Arrival A and then Registration RG and Intake Assessment IA in sequence So A RG IA 2 After intake the triage team evaluation Triage Interview TI and then Triage Classification TC in sequence

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We can combine A RG IA TI TC However to avoid too many nested sequences we can flatten But the notation allows binary operators only So we have to represent as a binary tree Let S1 A RG IA TI TC

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: After triage classification there is an exclusive decision on the type of initial diagnostic tests If the patient is suspected of a cardiovascular issue CE Otherwise FBP Only one of these tests CE or FBP So X CE FBP Then S1 X CE FBP

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Once the initial diagnostic test is done the results must be evaluated If the results are abnormal a loop commences SC then exclusive treatment TM or SPT Then Re Diagnostic Test RDT X FCE FBA This loop repeats after the re diagnostic test if the results are still abnormal returns to Specialist Consultation

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: The loop operator A B means do A then either exit or do B and then A again So model as  A LoopBody B tau After initial test X LoopBody tau tau This models either do the loop or skip with tau

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Possible traces After initial test either skip loop tau if normal or do loop if abnormal In the loop do body then either exit if normal or tau and repeat Matches the description enter loop only if initial abnormal exit when retest normal

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After normal results concurrent Advanced Imaging AI and Nutritional Counseling NC Both activities completed in true concurrency + AI NC Then sequence Follow up Appointment Scheduling FAS Detailed Discharge Instructions DDI Then concurrency Billing BL Insurance Claims Processing ICP Medical Records Finalization MRF

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Build entire tree as nested sequences binaries for more than two Use -> for sequences X for choices + for parallels * for loop with tau silent steps Notation root -> S1 -> S2 -> X Loop tau tau -> + AI NC -> -> FAS DDI -> + BL + ICP MRF

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Translate to code from pm4py Create ProcessTree for each leaf activity operator Build bottom up sequences for A RG IA TI TC XOR initial CE FBP LoopBody SC XOR treatment XOR retest loop with tau XOR after initial with tau parallels sequences set parent and append children correctly

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This is a valid model The loop condition modeled by loop operator and exclusive choice after initial test Matches possible traces and process description All activities included operators correct binary nesting proper
